creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
Please update drupal8 to 8.6.15 as this has been available upstream since 17th April and fixes the following problems:

Drupal core - Moderately critical - Multiple Vulnerabilities - SA-CORE-2019-005
https://www.drupal.org/SA-CORE-2019-005

Drupal core - Moderately critical - Cross Site Scripting - SA-CORE-2019-006
https://www.drupal.org/SA-CORE-2019-006

Ports as of r499712 builds 8.6.14 

thanks
